name: Blue Cheese Garlic Dip
recipeIngredient: 12 oz jar refrigerated blue cheese dressing
4.5 oz can tiny shrimp, rinsed and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all of the ingredients.
2. Mix well and cover.
3. Chill for at least 2 hours.
4. Serve with vegetables, crackers or hot wings.
5. Makes about 2 cups of dip.
